PLAINTIFF MAY FONG's Motion Protection Order.

MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SANJAI MOSES, JUDE KOSKI's Special Motion To Strike The Entire Complaint The 1st Through 10 Causes Of Action And Each Of The Or Allegations Therein Pursuant To CCP 425 16 And Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs CCP 425 16 C CRC 3 1702.
